company_type: Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) - Retail Shopping Centers

dependencies: Reliance on third-party contractors for construction and development
Dependence on market leading grocers as anchor tenants
Reliance on labor availability for construction and property operations
risks: Labor shortages and supply chain constraints impacting construction costs
Inflation increasing costs of construction materials and labor
Supply chain disruption from geopolitical events
Permitting delays extending project completion timelines

regulatory_risks: Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) compliance requirements
Building, fire, and safety regulations and building codes
Environmental laws and regulations related to hazardous substances
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code
State and local income and franchise taxes
Federal income tax on undistributed taxable income
Climate change and environmental disclosure regulations (SEC proposed rules, California legislation)
Data privacy and security laws (state and federal)
Changes in tax laws impacting REIT status or operations
Zoning and land use entitlement approvals for development
Changes in governmental policies relating to development

sanction_risks: Impact of war involving Russia and Ukraine on U.S. economy
Middle East conflicts and wars affecting global economy
Economic conflicts with China and slowing of China's economy
Potential tariffs impacting tenant costs and consumer spending
